body_plan.core_shape: three large round/oval blob lobes clustered together with a narrow elongated head-tube extending to the right
body_plan.symmetry: asymmetrical (three uneven round lobes fused in a cluster with a single lateral appendage)

parts.placement: clustered together forming the main mass — one upper-left, one lower-left, one lower-center, all touching/overlapping
extends rightward from the blob cluster, connecting body to bristle end
on the head tube near the junction with the body blobs

parts.shape: long thin straight lines radiating outward
parts.placement: at the far right tip of the head tube, splaying up, down, and forward like whiskers or spines

distinctive_features: body made of three fused round blobs of uneven size
single small dark eye placed on the narrow neck between body and head
long tapering snout/tube ending in a burst of 7 thin bristle-like spines
no visible legs anywhere on the body
locomotion: no legs drawn; presumed to shuffle/roll on its rounded fused underside, or drag itself using the bristled snout tip as a probing anchor
vibe: a squishy triple-blobbed grub-thing sniffing the air with a spiky whisker-nose
